<?php namespace Spatie\Feed\Helpers; use Illuminate\Support\Arr; use Illuminate\Support\Collection; class ResolveFeedItems { public static function resolve(string $feedName, $resolver): Collection { ConfigurationValidator::validateResolver($feedName, $resolver); $newResolver = $resolver; if (is_array($resolver) && ! str_contains($resolver[0], '@')) { $newResolver = implode('@', array_slice($resolver, 0, 2)); if (count($resolver) > 2) { $newResolver = array_merge([$newResolver], array_slice($resolver, 2, true)); } } return self::callFeedItemsResolver($newResolver); } protected static function callFeedItemsResolver($resolver): Collection { $resolver = Arr::wrap($resolver); $items = app()->call( array_shift($resolver), $resolver ); return $items; } }
